Title: T19065 dispersion
Result:
​​3/7, 0, new lot not produced yet.

​​3/8 - 3/12, 4 orders, NOK3/13, ML07, OK
Good Lead:
​​1. Longer PID time in bottom mixer without ram will easier lead to dispersion issue. '' Dispersion knowhow book _ T13127''
2.Functional liquid BR (CE1929, CE1933) is very sensitive to vapor, under high humidity, it will self crosslink and hard to disperse during mixing. '' Dispersion knowhow book _ Func.Liquid BR''3. T25045 dispersion issue in 2022, solved by switch M1 line from ML09 to ML07, suspected liquid cross-contamination in multi-dosing system.
Evidence:
​7338788, ISD, ML09 , relatively stable ram pressure during PID,no dispersion issue.7456884, SOP, ML09, Min ram pressure around 24bar (setting 100bar),dispersion issue.
7460550, Trial, ML07, Min ram pressure around 85bar (setting 100bar),no dispersion issue.
​All 3 orders process are nearly the same.
conclusion: ​Ram pressure fluctuate especially in PID
Next Step Direction 1:
​​1. Fix ML09 ram pressure and figure out the root cause
2. Routine check all mixers according to this issue, change spare part in advance if possible.3. Ram pressure record in DOPAC or PowerBI for Alert.

Title: 4号机FMF-B00460检测异常
Problem Severity:
生产FMF-B00460订单8770405胶料时，快检员检测到第7盘第30样时，发现不合格，检测到第31样也还是不合格，2:10分左右反馈给班长。班长通知主机暂停生产，此时上密炼机是50，下密炼机是第49车，胶料秤上还有两车。作业如下：
1、主机接到暂停生产后，等上下密炼机胶料排掉后联系维修到现场。
2、在2:20分，维修到达现场后，检查油料称量正常，主机手检查1.5楼无油料泄漏，维修建议检查胶料秤。
3、因胶料秤上有胶料，将胶料生产结束后，进行校秤，280kg砝码校秤显示279.9kg，胶料秤正常。
4、因没有明确出产生不良的原因，暂停当前订单FMF-B00460生产，耗时约30分钟后在生产洗车胶后准备生产FMF-M08161Y。此时主机费学来换赵锐吃饭。
5、在2:50分，更换FMF-M08161Y后，母胶称量确认后，进行胶料秤药品确认（药品工艺设置在胶料秤上），主机手费学将药品CR1001放到胶料秤上进行复称时发现11.75kg的药品显示12.8kg，出现超重1.05kg，更换一包药品后还是出现超重，拿出药品后放20kg砝码时，显示21.6kg，再次联系维修到现场；
6、在2:55分维修到达现场后，确认胶料称不准，再次用280kg砝码校秤，显示279.9kg，确认胶料秤正常，建议恢复生产；
7、在3:10分时，将第一车已经称量自动确认好的236kg M1-M08161Y母胶放到胶料秤上（胶料秤出现问题时手动将胶料转移到托盘上），显示只有220kg，比当时确认时少了16kg，补足后恢复生产。
Action:
1.接到生产反馈胶料检测异常时，第一时间检查油称，小药称，胶料称，均在公差范围内。
2. 通知生产恢复生产后，生产发现胶料称不准，具体见Problem Severity.
3. 到现场放280kg砝码显示279.9kg,在公差内。
4. 在3:10分时，生产将第一车已经称量自动确认好的236kg M1-M08161Y母胶放到胶料秤上（胶料秤出现问题时手动将胶料转移到托盘上），显示只有220kg，比当时确认时少了16kg，补足后恢复生产。
5. 白班人员到现场Gamba发现操作侧靠密炼机那个传感器下碎胶小药堆积严重，此处是生产放20kg砝码显示21.6kg的位置。放20kg砝码在4个传感器位置，显示均为20kg. 清理碎胶后继续跟踪。
6. 2023.10.18PM检查胶料称，清理运输带和辊筒上粘附的胶料。称检查正常。
Result: 清理传感器周围堆积的碎胶小药后，砝码检查没有误差.每班20 kg砝码检查胶料称正常。但是，2023.10.19又出现FMF-B460MH高，判定胶料不合格和胶料称无关。
Good Lead: 维修反应迅速，快速锁定胶料称偏差根本原因。
Evidence: 胶料称在公差内，胶料FMF-B460又出现同样的不合格，MH高，故此胶料不合格非胶料称原因。
conclusion: 胶料不合格和胶料称无关。

Title: FC55
Problem Severity: From 10/1 to 10/18 FC55 scrap 20pcs (11 splice open, 9 splice big).
Action:
1. Splice open: Adjust BA203 cylinder to make apex strip feeding belt action stable without shaking. Increased the delay time from 200ms to 400ms to make actions more coordinated.
2. Splice bigger: Enhance visual check during production at DAM machine.​
Good Lead:
1.For BA203, the head of apex strip is creasing and stack at bead ring.
2.All splice bigger were produced at DAM machine. A06441 is the critical compound in splice bigger.
Evidence:
1. BA203: The feeding belt actions aren’t coordinated.
2. Track A06441-apex production. The splice overlap length is larger, the thickness is larger, if reduce the length, it will increase the splice open risk due to high shrinkage rate.
conclusion: Adjust machine actions and enhance visual check can help to reduce scrap.
Next Step Direction 1: BA203 delay time from 200 to 400ms SOP; compare BA203, BA204 and other VMI machine; consult IE whether this delay time is the bottleneck time.  Ongoing study about A06441 standard and production stability

Title: MB03平均每天1.5次N339超重封存
Action:
1、对比3月份N339炭黑超重封存情况，从3月15日至3月27日炭黑超重封存平均每天0.6次。
2、头脑风暴针对3月15日后N339炭黑超重增加的变化点（工程、工艺、生产）
3、同比同一时期5、7号机N339炭黑超重情况，未出现超重封存
4、同对比5、7号机在加炭黑时日罐压力变化与3号机有差异
5、对应3号机加N339炭黑时会导致炭黑超重，需要工程在PLC界面上做个3号机加N339炭黑界面的提醒，让员工能够在加炭黑开始10分钟后注意称量状态
6、改为原材料库加一包N339炭黑验证日罐压力变化
Good Lead: 从3月28日至4月8日N339炭黑超重封存16次，其中15次为加炭黑时占比93.8%。
Evidence:
1、输送内衬漏料导致炭黑输送慢、加料过程时间变长；为保证机台不待料，手动频繁切换加料，清扫频率增加
2、3号机输送距离比7、9号机距离长，输送压力增大
3、3、5、7、9机台使用Zeeplin炭黑输送，2号机使用软控输送
4、7、9号机称量螺杆与下料斗之间设计不同　MB02MB03ML05ML07ML09上辅机机械供应商ZeeplinZeeplin软控ZeeplinZeeplin加料方式软控ZeeplinZeeplinZeeplinZeeplin下料螺杆与料斗连接方式插板阀插板阀直筒式插板阀+旋转阀插板阀+旋转阀
conclusion: 输送内衬漏料导致炭黑输送慢、加料过程时间变长；为保证机台不待料，手动频繁切换加料，清扫频率增加；导致MB03机台CC0339炭黑超重频次增加

Title: Scanner slow reaction
Problem Severity:
1.扫材料时突然闪屏，然后就回到主登录界面；

2.扫描枪放一会, 自动退到主登录界面。
3.每次出现退屏，员工都要重新用账号及密码登录。每个班平均重新登录30次以上，很浪费时间。
4.扫码枪无挂放及定置，扫码枪损坏率也较高。
Target: 减少扫码枪使用延时的次数及时间，改善扫码枪便捷性放置
Action:
1,IPC、硬盘升级。优化由于机台电脑端口满了，导致扫码枪服务被挤掉的情况。
2,一点课告知物料信息传输需等待5~10秒，切勿频繁点击造成端口占用。
3,添加库位条码验证、取代手动选项。

4,系统升级  包括 CGMS 和扫码枪的版本.
Result: 扫码枪卡顿调研结果从23年6月的86%(31台成型机存在卡顿情况）下降到24年3月的6%（2台成型机存在卡顿。（卡顿情况且控制均在10秒范围）
Good Lead:
1,IPC、硬盘升级。优化由于机台电脑端口满了，导致扫码枪服务被挤掉的情况。
2,系统升级  包括 CGMS 和扫码枪的版本.
Evidence: 24年3月系统卡顿机台下降到6%。
conclusion: 1，一点课标准化操作.2, 系统更新（IPC/CGMS/Scanner）。

Title: Sticky scrap of Cap strip
Action:
Cap strip 生产过程降粘性参数控制指导书培训。试验1：降CX602卷取1~6工位配重246->157g停放16小时   
试验2：降冷却水设定温度至18℃试验   

试验3：成型冠带剩余500米时，导开张力降至10% 实验跟踪       
试验4：冠带Bobbin鼓皮打底 ， 扩大试验进一步验证效果    
试验5：存储温度影响验证
Result:
​1)   21th  May， scrap 65kg



2）22th  May， scrap 34kg
3）23th  May ，scrap 27kg

4）24th  May ，scrap 36.8kg
5）25th  May ，scrap 22.2kg
6）26th  May ，scrap 12kg

7）27th  May ，scrap 20kg （History remaining 11kg） 
8）28th  May ，scrap 19kg （History remaining 9.8kg） 
9）29th  May ，scrap 9.8kg （History remaining 9.1kg）
Good Lead: Cap strip optimum storage temperature ：≤25℃
Evidence:
试验1：降CX602卷取1~6工位配重246->157g 停放16小时 →12卷只有一卷无粘黏；无效

试验2 ：降冷却水设定温度至18℃试验    →1，实际水温18~19℃，环境湿度45~49，冷却鼓无结露，成型未按要求使用，待跟进；2.后续跟踪可以使用完，因考虑冷却鼓结露风险，已将水温调至19℃，但冷却系统水温波动18.5~22.6℃；效果不明显
试验3：成型冠带剩余500米时，导开张力降至10% 实验跟踪 →长期研究      
试验4：冠带Bobbin鼓皮打底 ， 扩大试验进一步验证观察效果 →长期研究   试验5：存储温度影响验证   →25℃生胎区存储，16卷全部能清空，扩大到32卷验证能清空；效果明显 →5月24号中班开始执行Cap strip 冷存储，scrap 2有下降趋势。
conclusion: Cap strip 尾部粘黏的原因不是因为材料表面黏性导致的，而是因为材料存储在大于25℃环境中，材料变软后被张力挤压粘黏的，当材料存储在低于25℃环境中，加快了材料塑形，塑形后的材料弹性降低，不受外部压力的影响而发生粘黏。
Next Step Direction 1: Set up the Cap strip storage environment
Next Step Direction 2: Improvement of cap strip in bobbin tail tension

Action:

A2. Change back to flash steam package; Reduce back pressure to -0.02; reduce vacuum degree from -51 to -57 @25th 7 12:08
R2: CU503/504 4th pcs nok, extend to other cavities

R3. no overcure happened in mid and night shift


A4. Change the trap #1@25th 7 18:20
further verification needed


A5. switch back to flash steam and fully close #1 trap bypass @26th 7 15:12
R5. CU701/702 under cure @26th 19:50


A6. Switch back to normal 3 bar@26th 7 20:33
R6. No FC66C during weekend


A7: Combine regeneration steam and fresh steam + bypass value open @29th 7 12:40. Curing trench 1 to 5 bypass value closed gradually @29th 7 16:00 - @30th 7 10:00
R7: No FC66C


A8: Open phase III bypass value for each trench and first main trap bypass @31th 7 9:00 10:36. Gradually close each single tranch
R8: No FC66C
Good Lead: Open Phase I 3bar main piping bypass (after flash steam and fresh steamtriple valve), close bypas after 3 days and confirm no condensate released from main piping. 打开一期主管道进地沟前的3bar直排（闪蒸和新鲜蒸汽三通后），三天后关闭并且确认主管直排无水Open 3bar bypass value from start/end of curing trench 1 to 5  (Line 1 to Line A), gradually close bypas after 8 hours and confirm no condensate released from each piping. 打开硫化1到5号支沟3bar首末端直排（硫化1-A线），8小时后关闭并且确认支管直排无水
Evidence: All under cure occurred on bottom side and concentrated on Phase 1/2 line start and end cavitiesLots of condensate water when opening bypass value of trap#1
conclusion: After unscheduled plant shut down, condensate return to flash steam system which lead to lower side under cure. 非计划性停产后，蒸汽系统的冷凝水返回闪蒸管路系统导致下模欠硫
Next Step Direction 1: Add addtional traps for Phase I & II main piping and update drawings of curing piping system. 一二期主管道增加疏水阀并更新硫化管路图

Title: C10430 Scorch
Action: Change pallet weight from 700 to 500kgAdding anti-tack for less sticky from 2.6% to 3%Trial to change the C10430 to ML08 with spray cooling function
Result:
7/24:  New order:   OK7/26:  2nd lot :         OK
7/29:  3rd  lot :        OK
Good Lead:
1.Position:   one pallet with 700kg. 

Top of the whole pallet normally consumed.  Mid and bottom found scorch during CL process on open mills.Mid and bottom position with serious sticky issue between compound sheets --- poor cooling efficiency. 
2.Temp:   Top position temp measured is 30℃， Mid position temp 39.8℃ after 7 days storage.
3.MDR160:  Top position:2 min     Mid:1.3min   Bottom:2 min
Evidence:
1.Temp:   Top position temp measured is 30℃， Mid position temp 39.8℃ after 7 days storage.
2.MDR160:  Top position:2 min     Mid:1.3min   Bottom:2 min
conclusion: Mid of the compound pallet has higher heat ,  and can not lose heat easily.The pallet weight is too much with 700kgThe anti-tack concentration is less in summer:  2.5%, which cause the mid and bottom compound sheets stick to each other.  Compound sheeting temp is higher (55℃）than previous years due to the dust collection room.

Title: FC96B
Action: DR request submitted to control tread gauge to lower limit.Article RAR to TB machine with GT scale.
Good Lead: Special OE customer weight requirement already in semi-product (tread)Tread gauge and width is above target based on profile scan.
Evidence: According to the hot prep data, after the DR implementation on March 2, which enforced lower limits on tread width and thickness, the 96B tire weight issue has been successfully resolved. In addition, tire building data demonstrates that transferring this article to production on machines equipped with a green tire scale has yielded further improvements. These machines, by enabling real-time monitoring of raw tire weight and dynamic adjustment of machine parameters, have significantly mitigated the 96B tire weight problem.
conclusion: In conclusion, both enforce tread lower limit and move to GT scale TB machine  have contributed to resolving the 96B tire weight issue.  Additionally, given the stricter tire weight requirements for OE customers such as MB, BMW, and KIA, a more unified and rigorous control system is essential.
Next Step Direction 1: Recommend EP as next stepCompile a list of specifications for customers with special quality requirements (BMW, MO, KIA), particularly those with a ±2% weight tolerance requirement.Collaborate with Hot Prep and Quality teams to implement document control for the listed specifications based on special weight requirements and incorporate them into the special control list.Establish a long-term solution and monitoring mechanism to dynamically manage the special control list.

Good Lead: The position of the cutting ply splice changes very slowly for 19-inch tires. If the cutting ply splice is located too close to the inner liner splice, it will cause poor balance
conclusion: If ply length is more or less equal to ply width in calendaring, then cutting splice position will be stable and if the cutting splice is close to IL splice , it will cause poor balance

Title: FC32A Rework
Action:
GWAA:
PU stitching parameters adjustSecond ply width +5mmES recipe for production
rework ratio drop from 46% to 0.6%


GGWO:
Change the mold that have optimized and use ES recipe-rework ratio drop from 68% to 19%Tread width went to lower limit-ineffectiveConstruction improvement on add serration line to the Z-axis of the mold closing line-PendingConstruction improvement on reduce 8mm tread width & vents adding-Pending 

ARG：
SW&TD profile optimized-rework ratio drop from 62% to 21%Tread width went to lower limit-ineffectiveConstruction improvement on reduce drum width-ISD effective
Good Lead: increase second ply widthAdjust PU stitching time and pressurereduce drum widthSpecial control on TD & SW profile
conclusion:
For double ply articles can increase the second ply width to improve the performance of 32AThe phenomenon of peeling in 32A are mainly cause by too much materials. Reducing the width of the drum or modifying the SW die can effectively prevent scratches between the material and the mold.
The other reason of 32A happened is the lap (Or gap) between the edge of the wing compound on the tread and the sidewall is too close to the mold closing line. We can optimize the landing point by adjusting the stitching pressure parameters or the tread profile.
